top_categories.workout_context: Race-pace efforts that mimic Spinneys Dubai 92 Cycle Challenge's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before February.
57 miles on flat burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
When someone attacks on flat, you have 10 seconds to respond or you're off the back. This builds that response.
Spinneys Dubai 92 Cycle Challenge's flat forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 57 miles.
Spinneys Dubai 92 Cycle Challenge's flat rewards steady threshold power. Surging and recovering costs more watts than just holding.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Spinneys Dubai 92 Cycle Challenge. Train it until it feels boring.
Long rides with hard efforts mixed in. Simulates what Spinneys Dubai 92 Cycle Challenge's flat actually does to you.
2-minute all-out efforts on flat. Closing gaps, responding to attacks, sprinting for position. Train the burn.
Base fitness for Spinneys Dubai 92 Cycle Challenge. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.
Double-threshold training builds sustained power with less fatigue. More FTP per hour of training.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Spinneys Dubai 92 Cycle Challenge, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
At Spinneys Dubai 92 Cycle Challenge, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for Spinneys Dubai 92 Cycle Challenge’s 57 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Race Simulation, Durability, and VO2max to prepare you for 57 miles of flat in Expo City Dubai, Al Forsan Park.
